hero.subheadline: Sports, movies, series, and worldwide TV — buffer-free on any device. 150+ countries. 24-hour free trial, instant activation.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From signup to streaming in under 5 minutes
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick any plan — or start with a free 24-hour trial. No credit card required.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Receive your M3U URL and Xtream codes instantly via WhatsApp or Telegram.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Add your credentials to any IPTV app and stream 110,000+ channels in 4K.

pricing.subtitle: All plans include the full channel list, 4K streams, EPG guide, and 24/7 support.
